window_summary: This window tracks the recent lencx/ChatGPT release stream from early v0.1.8 through v1.1.0, covering menu enhancements, export features, UI improvements, and bug fixes.

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.1.8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.1.8
Tag: v0.1.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-11T19:06:35Z; created_at: 2022-12-11T19:06:15Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Feat
- menu enhancement: theme, titlebar
- modify website address https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/14
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.1.8, the release note describes menu enhancements including theme and titlebar changes, and a modification to the website address as noted in issue #14.

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.2.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.2.0
Tag: v0.2.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-12T04:46:04Z; created_at: 2022-12-12T04:45:41Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Feat
menu enhancement:
- customize user-agent to prevent security detection interception (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/17)
- clear all chatgpt configuration files
**Note: The application cannot be opened, or it may be due to a destructive update that caused the previous configuration file to be incompatible. You can try to clear the files in the ~/.chatgpt directory and restart.**
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.2.0, the release note introduces menu enhancements: customizing the user-agent to prevent security detection interception (issue #17) and the ability to clear all ChatGPT configuration files. A note warns that destructive updates may cause incompatibility, and clearing files in the ~/.chatgpt directory may help.

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.6.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.6.0
Tag: v0.6.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-23T11:00:54Z; created_at: 2022-12-23T11:00:26Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- windows show Chinese when upgrading
## Feat:
- Optimize the generated pdf file size
- Menu added `Sync Prompts`
- `Control Center` added `Sync Custom`
- The slash command is triggered by the enter key
- Under the slash command, use the tab key to modify the contents of the `{q}` tag (only single changes are supported (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/54)
![chatgpt-cmd](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16164244/209324817-9f4be7f6-d47c-4a77-acc6-2d7d4ceb82aa.gif)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.6.0, the release note fixes an issue where Windows showed Chinese during upgrade. Features include optimized generated PDF file size, a new 'Sync Prompts' menu item, 'Sync Custom' in the Control Center, slash command triggering by the Enter key, and using the Tab key to modify the contents of the {q} tag under slash commands (only single changes supported, issue #54).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.7.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.7.0
Tag: v0.7.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-27T07:16:07Z; created_at: 2022-12-27T07:15:47Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- Mac M1 copy/paste does not work on some system versions
- Optimize the save chat log button to a small icon, the tray window no longer provides a save chat log button (the buttons causes the input area to become larger and the content area to become smaller)
## Feat:
- Use the keyboard `⇧` (arrow up) and `⇩` (arrow down) keys to select the slash command
- Global shortcuts to the chatgpt app (mac: command+shift+o, windows: ctrl+shift+o)
![chatgpt](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16164244/209628694-6be44fc8-17d7-4803-9e5b-c60a01fa92af.gif)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.7.0, the release note fixes Mac M1 copy/paste issues on some system versions and optimizes the save chat log button to a small icon, removing it from the tray window to prevent layout issues. Features include using the up and down arrow keys to select slash commands and global shortcuts to bring up the ChatGPT app (Mac: Command+Shift+O, Windows: Ctrl+Shift+O).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.8.0
Tag: v0.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-07T05:15:55Z; created_at: 2023-01-07T05:15:22Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- Close the main window and hide it in the tray (windows systems) (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/103)
## Feat
- Theme enhancement (Light, Dark, System) (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/52)
- Automatic updates support `silent` settings (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/102)
- Pop-up Search (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/122): select the ChatGPT content with the mouse, the `DALL·E 2` button appears, and click to jump (note: because the search content filled by the script cannot trigger the event directly, you need to enter a space in the input box to make the button clickable).
![chatgpt-popup-search](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16164244/211132477-a8f68b8d-8cb0-46d6-9924-b08342161a07.png)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.8.0, the release note fixes an issue where closing the main window hides it in the tray on Windows (issue #103). Features include theme enhancement (Light, Dark, System) (issue #52), automatic updates with silent settings (issue #102), and pop-up search: selecting ChatGPT content with the mouse shows a DALL·E 2 button that jumps to search (issue #122).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.8.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.8.1
Tag: v0.8.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-12T11:29:56Z; created_at: 2023-01-12T11:29:21Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- Export button keeps blinking (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/189)
- Export button in the old chat does not work (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/185)
- Disable export sharing links because it is a security risk (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/126)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.8.1, the release note fixes the export button blinking (issue #189), the export button not working in old chats (issue #185), and disables export sharing links due to security risks (issue #126).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.9.0
chunks.raw_text: Repository: lencx/ChatGPT Release: ChatGPT v0.9.0 Tag: v0.9.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-14T18:13:21Z; created_at: 2023-01-14T18:12:56Z Release notes: See the assets to download this version and install. ## Fix - Export button does not work (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/195) - Optimize prompts display ## Feat - Add an export markdown button (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/175) - `Control Center` adds `Notes` and `Download` menus for managing exported chat files (Markdown, PNG, PDF). `Notes` supports markdown previews
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.9.0, the release note fixes the export button not working (issue #195) and optimizes prompts display. Features include an export markdown button (issue #175) and new 'Notes' and 'Download' menus in the Control Center for managing exported chat files (Markdown, PNG, PDF), with Notes supporting markdown previews.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.9.2, the release note fixes the slash command not working (issue #207).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.10.0
chunks.raw_text: Repository: lencx/ChatGPT Release: ChatGPT v0.10.0 Tag: v0.10.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-24T18:29:44Z; created_at: 2023-01-24T18:27:38Z Release notes: See the assets to download this version and install. **Note: The data is missing some validation, if you go directly to the `Settings` menu it will cause an error, try adding a piece of data to the menu `Awesome`. It will be fixed in the next version (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/248).** ## Fix - After exporting a file in Windows, open an empty file explorer (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/242) ## Feat - Markdown files support editing and live preview - Add `Awesome` menu to the `Control Center` (similar to bookmarks, but it's just a start, more possibilities in the future), custom URL support for the home and tray windows (if you're tired of ChatGPT as your home screen).
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.10.0, the release note warns that missing data validation may cause errors when going directly to the Settings menu, and suggests adding data to the 'Awesome' menu first (issue #248). Fixes include resolving an empty file explorer after exporting on Windows (issue #242). Features include markdown file editing with live preview, and an 'Awesome' menu in the Control Center (similar to bookmarks) with custom URL support for home and tray windows.

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.10.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.10.1
Tag: v0.10.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-01-25T11:21:35Z; created_at: 2023-01-25T11:21:12Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- Program exception when `Awesome` data is empty (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/248)
## Feat
- New shortcut key to change zoom level (30% - 200%), `+` or `-` 10% each time, `0` will be reset to 100% (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/202)
- Windows: `Ctrl +`, `Ctrl -`, `Ctrl 0`
- MacOS: `Cmd +`, `Cmd -`, `Cmd 0`
![zoom](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16164244/214550855-221bea2d-df9b-459a-b7e4-df1da94749a9.gif)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.10.1, the release note fixes a program exception when 'Awesome' data is empty (issue #248). Features include new shortcut keys to change zoom level (30%-200%), with '+' or '-' adjusting by 10% and '0' resetting to 100% (issue #202). Windows shortcuts: Ctrl +, Ctrl -, Ctrl 0; macOS: Cmd +, Cmd -, Cmd 0.

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.10.2
chunks.raw_text: Repository: lencx/ChatGPT Release: ChatGPT v0.10.2 Tag: v0.10.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-02-01T16:46:59Z; created_at: 2023-02-01T16:46:34Z Release notes: See the assets to download this version and install. ## Fix - PNG and PDF buttons do not work (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/274) - Change the window size and the Send button is obscured by the Export button (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/286) - Change forward and backward shortcuts (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/254) - MacOS: `Cmd [`, `Cmd ]` - Windows and Linux: `Ctrl [`, `Ctrl ]` ## Feat - Copy a single record to the clipboard (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/191)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.10.2, the release note fixes PNG and PDF buttons not working (issue #274), the Send button being obscured by the Export button when resizing (issue #286), and changes forward/backward shortcuts (issue #254). macOS: Cmd [, Cmd ]; Windows/Linux: Ctrl [, Ctrl ]. Features include copying a single record to the clipboard (issue #191).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.10.3
chunks.raw_text: Repository: lencx/ChatGPT Release: ChatGPT v0.10.3 Tag: v0.10.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-02-03T05:35:03Z; created_at: 2023-02-03T05:34:43Z Release notes: See the assets to download this version and install. > Note: As of now the ChatGPT desktop app has added a lot of exciting features and it continues to improve, as the app grows it has gone far beyond what ChatGPT was intended for. I want to make it the ultimate goal that any website can be easily wrapped to the desktop through user customization. So it needed an international user guide to guide users to use it more professionally. And https://app.nofwl.com is the manual for the app, which will be built into the app (`Menu -> Window -> ChatGPT User's Guide`) so you can access it anytime. It's just starting at the moment, so stay tuned. Doc Repo: https://github.com/lencx/app ## Fix - Incompatible configuration data causes program crashes (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/295) ## Feat - Silent copy text - Markdown export support distinguishes between users and bots (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/233)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.10.3, the release note announces an international user guide at https://app.nofwl.com, built into the app via Menu -> Window -> ChatGPT User's Guide. Fixes include incompatible configuration data causing crashes (issue #295). Features include silent copy text and markdown export distinguishing between users and bots (issue #233).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.11.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.11.0
Tag: v0.11.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-02-16T16:17:11Z; created_at: 2023-02-16T15:54:38Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- User-defined close button behavior (exit or minimize) (`Control Center -> Settings -> Main Window -> Close Exit`). (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/359)
- Markdown content layout (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/378)
## Feat
- Set the main window and tray window size (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/405)
- Save window positions and sizes and restore them when the app is reopened (`Control Center -> Settings -> General -> Save Window State`)
- macOS support for aarch64 installer (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/380)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.11.0, the release note fixes user-defined close button behavior (exit or minimize) via Control Center -> Settings -> Main Window -> Close Exit (issue #359) and markdown content layout (issue #378). Features include setting main and tray window sizes (issue #405), saving window positions and sizes with restore on reopen (Control Center -> Settings -> General -> Save Window State), and macOS aarch64 installer support (issue #380).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.11.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.11.1
Tag: v0.11.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-03-04T02:12:24Z; created_at: 2023-03-04T02:00:45Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Fix
- Export button blinks (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/541)
- System tray supports sending with Enter key, for text line breaks please use the shortcut key `Shift + Enter` (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/533)
**If you encounter the error message `"ChatGPT" is damaged and can't be opened. You should move it to the Trash`. while installing software on macOS, it may be due to security settings restrictions in macOS. To solve this problem, please try the following command in Terminal:**
```bash
sudo xattr -r -d com.apple.quarantine /YOUR_PATH/ChatGPT.app
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.11.1, the release note fixes the export button blinking (issue #541) and adds Enter key support for sending in the system tray, with Shift+Enter for line breaks (issue #533). It also provides a macOS quarantine workaround command.

chunks.title: ChatGPT v0.12.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: lencx/ChatGPT
Release: ChatGPT v0.12.0
Tag: v0.12.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-03-05T04:36:19Z; created_at: 2023-03-05T04:18:00Z
Release notes:
See the assets to download this version and install.
## Feat
- Add refresh button
- Add text-to-speech (`Control Center -> Settings -> General -> Set Speech Language`) (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/534)
- Automatically focus input field (https://github.com/lencx/ChatGPT/issues/550)
https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/16164244/222942069-f17a5846-7362-409a-8e16-495d2073ef9f.mov
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v0.12.0, the release note adds a refresh button, text-to-speech with configurable speech language (Control Center -> Settings -> General -> Set Speech Language) (issue #534), and automatic focus on the input field (issue #550).

chunks.title: ChatGPT v1.0.0
chunks.raw_text: Repository: lencx/ChatGPT Release: ChatGPT v1.0.0 Tag: v1.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-05-25T05:24:27Z; created_at: 2023-05-25T05:05:50Z Release notes: See the assets to download this version and install. Live Demo: - ChatGPT v1.0.0: https://youtu.be/IIuuB5vFFAQ - How to use GPT-4-Mobile without restrictions in the ChatGPT desktop application? https://youtu.be/AZSe3sHH9_M **Note: This version modifies some configuration files. It is recommended to backup the `~/.chatgpt` folder in advance to avoid loss of important configurations.** Feat: - The synchronization method for prompts has been optimized, now supporting local file uploads - Scripts have been externalized, allowing for editing and synchronization - Removed the `Awesome` menu from `Control Center` Fix: - Chat history export is blank - Change the export files location to the `Download` directory ## macOS macos_xxx seems broken If you encounter the error message "ChatGPT" is damaged and can't be opened. You should move it to the Trash. while installing software on macOS, it may be due to security settings restrictions in macOS. To solve this problem, please try the following command in Terminal: ```bash xattr -cr /YOUR_PATH/ChatGPT.app ```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release v1.0.0, the release note warns that configuration files are modified and recommends backing up the ~/.chatgpt folder. Features include optimized prompt synchronization with local file uploads, externalized scripts for editing and synchronization, and removal of the 'Awesome' menu from Control Center. Fixes include blank chat history export and changing export files location to the Download directory. A macOS quarantine workaround is provided.

questions.query_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT releases, which release introduces a pop-up search feature that shows a DALL·E 2 button when selecting content?

answer_support.answer_text: pop-up search: selecting ChatGPT content with the mouse shows a DALL·E 2 button that jumps to search

questions.query_text: Across the lencx/ChatGPT releases, how does the export-related change in v0.9.0 differ from the export-related change in v1.1.0?

options.text: v0.9.0 adds an export markdown button and new Notes/Download menus for managing exports, while v1.1.0 moves the export button to the sidebar to prevent layout conflicts.
v0.9.0 disables export sharing links, while v1.1.0 fixes the export button blinking.
Both releases only fix the export button not working without adding new export features.
v0.9.0 removes the export button entirely, while v1.1.0 restores it.

questions.expected_answer: v0.9.0 adds an export markdown button and new Notes/Download menus for managing exports, while v1.1.0 moves the export button to the sidebar to prevent layout conflicts.

answer_support.answer_text: Features include an export markdown button (issue #175) and new 'Notes' and 'Download' menus in the Control Center for managing exported chat files
Moved the export button to the sidebar to prevent layout conflicts.

questions.query_text: In the lencx/ChatGPT release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds customizable global shortcuts and attempts to resolve Linux shared library errors, (2) a release that introduces theme enhancement (Light, Dark, System) and pop-up search, (3) a release that adds text-to-speech and automatic input focus.

answer_support.answer_text: attempts to resolve Linux errors about loading shared libraries (issue #111) and adds customizable global shortcuts
theme enhancement (Light, Dark, System) (issue #52) ... pop-up search
adds a refresh button, text-to-speech ... and automatic focus on the input field
